projects.dataBoundary: HOZO AM owns its own LINE, Notion, Render, GitHub, and environment values.
7AM owns its own LINE, Notion, Render, GitHub, and environment values.
BuildAM owns its own LINE, Notion, Render, GitHub, and environment values. Minimal-seed project: only foundational AM_Core packages are installed; engineering-module features are project-local.

ForestAM is a verbatim clone of BuildAM's architecture (display name 葉小蝸 AI 小助手). Shares Seven's Notion integration token and AI API keys with BuildAM by explicit instruction; data isolation is enforced by parent-page verification against its own Notion 'AI' page. Owns its own Render/GitHub. Minimal-seed, no project bindings yet. LINE OA channel: pending decision.
